goal: Add production Chain Listener boundary with TipRouterV1 log decode, catch-up, confirmation window, reorg handling, cursor persistence, and confirmed-only support.normalize enqueue.
verificationOracle: Local typecheck and tests verify ABI decode, idempotent log recording, cursor persistence, confirmation gating, reorg status transitions, and outbox enqueue timing.
storageOracle: Migration 0002 adds chain_cursors and transaction confirmation scan index; repository tests verify cursor and transaction status methods.
releaseGateOracle: This PR is G3 partial only and does not claim full production readiness.
